team_request.title: New team request
team_request.body: {admin_username} requested a new team "{team_name}" ({team_slug}). Approval is required before its members can sign in.

join_request.title: Join request
join_request.body: {username} requested to join {team_name}. Review it under Admin → Join requests.

join.title: Request to join
join.description: Send a request to join this team. An administrator will review it.
join.passwordHint: At least 12 characters, one uppercase letter, and one digit.
join.messagePlaceholder: Optional — anything the admins should know
join.successDesc: An administrator will review your request. You'll be able to sign in once it's approved.
